For a step-by-step guide to resolve merge conflicts, see <https://docs.github.com/en/pull-requests/collaborating-with-pull-requests/addressing-merge-conflicts/resolving-a-merge-conflict-using-the-command-line>.

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+name: Rerun PR merge conflicts check
+
+on:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: "0 3 * * *"
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+jobs:
+  rerun:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    permissions:
+      actions: write
+      contents: read
+      pull-requests: write
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+        with:
+          show-progress: 'false'
+      - name: Trigger "On PR opened/updated (check)" for all open PRs
+        env:
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+        run: |
+          workflow_name="On PR opened/updated (check)"
+
+          gh pr list --state open --json number --jq '.[] | "\(.number)"' |
+          while read pr; do
+            echo "Triggering '$workflow_name' for PR #$pr"
+            gh workflow run "$workflow_name" --ref main --field pr_number="$pr"
+            echo "Triggered '$workflow_name' for PR [#$pr](https://github.com/JabRef/jabref/pull/$pr)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          done

+name: Mark and close stale change-request PRs
+
+on:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: "0 3 * * *"
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+permissions:
+  pull-requests: write
+
+jobs:
+  stale:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/stale@v10
+        with:
+          repo-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+          exempt-pr-labels: "📌 Pinned,dev: no-bot-comments"
+
+          days-before-issue-stale: -1
+          days-before-issue-close: -1
+
+          only-pr-labels: "status: changes-required"
+          stale-pr-label: "status: changes-required"
+          remove-pr-stale-when-updated: false
+
+          days-before-pr-stale: 14
+          stale-pr-message: >
+            The requested changes were not addressed for 14 days.
+            Please follow-up in the next 7 days or your PR will be automatically closed.
+            You can check the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/JabRef/jabref/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#pull-request-process) for hints on the pull request process.
+
+          days-before-pr-close: 7
+          close-pr-message: >
+            This PR is being closed due to continued inactivity.

+---
+parent: Code Howtos
+---
+
+# AI
+
+The AI feature of JabRef is built on [LangChain4j](https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j) and [Deep Java Library](https://djl.ai/).
+
+## Architectural Decisions
+
+See [ADR-0037](../decisions/0037-rag-architecture-implementation.md) for the decision regarding the RAG infrastructure.
+
+## Feature "Chat with PDF(s)"
+
+This is implemented mainly in the class [org.jabref.logic.ai.chatting.AiChatLogic].
+From there, one will find preferences and other required infrastructure.
+
+## Feature "Summarize PDF(s)"
+
+This is implemented in the class [org.jabref.logic.ai.summarization.GenerateSummaryTask].
+
+## Feature "BibTeX from Reference Text"
+
+The general interface is [org.jabref.logic.importer.plaincitation.PlainCitationParser].
+The class implementing it using AI is [org.jabref.logic.importer.plaincitation.LlmPlainCitationParser].
+
+## Feature "Reference Extractor"
+
+Extracts the list of references (Section ["References"](../glossary/references.md)) from the last page of the PDF to a List of BibEntry.
+
+The general interface is [org.jabref.logic.importer.fileformat.pdf.BibliographyFromPdfImporter].
+The class implementing it using AI is [org.jabref.logic.importer.plaincitation.LlmPlainCitationParser].

 # Walkthrough: Search

+Prepare\ search\ settings=Preparar la configuración de búsqueda
 
 # Step 2
+Welcome\ to\ the\ search\ walkthrough=Bienvenido al tutorial de búsqueda
+This\ walkthrough\ will\ guide\ you\ through\ JabRef's\ search\ capabilities.\ We've\ loaded\ a\ sample\ library\ to\ demonstrate\ various\ search\ techniques.=Este tutorial le guiará a través de las funciones de búsqueda de JabRef. Hemos cargado una biblioteca de ejemplo para mostrar diversas técnicas de búsqueda.
 
 # Step 3
+Click\ in\ the\ search\ field\ to\ begin=Haga clic en el campo de búsqueda para comenzar.
+You\ can\ also\ use\ `Ctrl+F`\ or\ `Cmd+F`\ to\ focus\ the\ search\ field.=También puede utilizar `Ctrl+F` o `Cmd+F` para enfocar el campo de búsqueda.
 
 # Step 4
 Type\ `machine\ learning`=Tipo `aprendizaje automático`
 As\ you\ type,\ JabRef\ instantly\ dims\ all\ non-matching\ entries.\ By\ default,\ searches\ are\ case-insensitive\ and\ look\ through\ all\ fields\ like\ title,\ author,\ abstract,\ and\ keywords.=A medida que escribe, JabRef atenúa al instante todas las entradas que no coinciden. De forma predeterminada, las búsquedas no distinguen entre mayúsculas y minúsculas y revisan todos los campos, como título, autor, resumen y palabras clave.
 
 # Step 5
+Understanding\ search\ results=Comprender los resultados de búsqueda
+Notice\ how\ entries\ not\ containing\ "machine\ learning"\ are\ dimmed.=Observe cómo las entradas que no contienen "aprendizaje automático" aparecen atenuadas.
 This\ found\ entries\ with\ at\ least\ a\ field\ in\ their\ metadata\ (*e.g.,*\ title,\ author,\ abstract,\ *etc.*)\ containing\ "machine\ learning".=Se encontraron entradas con al menos un campo en sus metadatos (*por ejemplo,* título, autor, resumen, *etc.*) que contiene "aprendizaje automático".
 
 # Step 6
+Toggle\ filter\ mode\ to\ hide\ non-matching\ entries=Activar el modo de filtro para ocultar las entradas que no coinciden
+Filter\ mode\ shows\ only\ matching\ entries,\ hiding\ everything\ else.=El modo de filtro muestra sólo las entradas coincidentes y oculta todo lo demás.
 
 # Step 7
+Clear\ the\ search\ to\ see\ all\ entries\ again=Borrar la búsqueda para ver todas las entradas nuevamente
 
 # Step 8
 Type\ `author\ \=\ Son`=Tipo `autor \= Hijo`
+The\ equals\ sign\ (`\=`)\ means\ "contains"\ and\ is\ case-insensitive\ by\ default.=El signo igual (`\=`) significa "contiene" y no distingue entre mayúsculas y minúsculas de forma predeterminada.
+This\ query\ finds\ all\ papers\ where\ any\ author's\ name\ contains\ "Son,"\ including\ "Maddison,"\ "Watson,\ J.,"\ or\ "Matson,\ Robert\ P.".\ It\ won't\ match\ "Son"\ appearing\ in\ titles\ or\ abstracts.=Esta consulta encuentra todos los artículos cuyo nombre de autor contenga "Son", incluyendo "Maddison", "Watson, J." o "Matson, Robert P." No se encontrará con "Son" en títulos o resúmenes.
 
 # Step 9
+Type\ `date\ \=\=\ 2023`=Tipo `date \=\= 2023`
+The\ double\ equals\ (`\=\=`)\ means\ exact\ match,\ not\ just\ contains.\ This\ query\ finds\ only\ papers\ with\ field\ "date"\ exactly\ in\ 2023.=El doble signo igual (`\=\=`) significa coincidencia exacta, no solo contiene. Esta consulta solo encuentra artículos con el campo "fecha" correspondiente exactamente a 2023.
+With\ single\ equals\ (*e.g.,*\ `date\ \=\ 23`),\ you'd\ also\ match\ dates\ like\ 1923\ or\ 2230.=Con un solo igual (p. ej., `fecha \= 23`), también coincidirías con fechas como 1923 o 2230.
 
 # Step 10
 Type\ `shortauthor\ \=\ WHO\ AND\ date\ \=\=\ 2023`=Tipo `shortauthor\=OMS Y fecha\=\=2023`
+This\ query\ finds\ papers\ by\ WHO\ from\ 2023.\ `AND`\ requires\ both\ conditions\ to\ be\ true.=Esta consulta encuentra artículos de la OMS a partir de 2023. `AND` requiere que ambas condiciones sean verdaderas.
 
 # Step 11

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+name: Rerun PR merge conflicts check
+
+on:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: "0 3 * * *"
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+jobs:
+  rerun:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    permissions:
+      actions: write
+      contents: read
+      pull-requests: write
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+        with:
+          show-progress: 'false'
+      - name: Trigger "On PR opened/updated (check)" for all open PRs
+        env:
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+        run: |
+          workflow_name="On PR opened/updated (check)"
+
+          gh pr list --state open --json number --jq '.[] | "\(.number)"' |
+          while read pr; do
+            echo "Triggering '$workflow_name' for PR #$pr"
+            gh workflow run "$workflow_name" --ref main --field pr_number="$pr"
+            echo "Triggered '$workflow_name' for PR [#$pr](https://github.com/JabRef/jabref/pull/$pr)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          done

+name: Mark and close stale change-request PRs
+
+on:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: "0 3 * * *"
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+permissions:
+  pull-requests: write
+
+jobs:
+  stale:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/stale@v10
+        with:
+          repo-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+          exempt-pr-labels: "📌 Pinned,dev: no-bot-comments"
+
+          days-before-issue-stale: -1
+          days-before-issue-close: -1
+
+          only-pr-labels: "status: changes-required"
+          stale-pr-label: "status: changes-required"
+          remove-pr-stale-when-updated: false
+
+          days-before-pr-stale: 14
+          stale-pr-message: >
+            The requested changes were not addressed for 14 days.
+            Please follow-up in the next 7 days or your PR will be automatically closed.
+            You can check the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/JabRef/jabref/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#pull-request-process) for hints on the pull request process.
+
+          days-before-pr-close: 7
+          close-pr-message: >
+            This PR is being closed due to continued inactivity.

+---
+parent: Code Howtos
+---
+
+# AI
+
+The AI feature of JabRef is built on [LangChain4j](https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j) and [Deep Java Library](https://djl.ai/).
+
+## Architectural Decisions
+
+See [ADR-0037](../decisions/0037-rag-architecture-implementation.md) for the decision regarding the RAG infrastructure.
+
+## Feature "Chat with PDF(s)"
+
+This is implemented mainly in the class [org.jabref.logic.ai.chatting.AiChatLogic].
+From there, one will find preferences and other required infrastructure.
+
+## Feature "Summarize PDF(s)"
+
+This is implemented in the class [org.jabref.logic.ai.summarization.GenerateSummaryTask].
+
+## Feature "BibTeX from Reference Text"
+
+The general interface is [org.jabref.logic.importer.plaincitation.PlainCitationParser].
+The class implementing it using AI is [org.jabref.logic.importer.plaincitation.LlmPlainCitationParser].
+
+## Feature "Reference Extractor"
+
+Extracts the list of references (Section ["References"](../glossary/references.md)) from the last page of the PDF to a List of BibEntry.
+
+The general interface is [org.jabref.logic.importer.fileformat.pdf.BibliographyFromPdfImporter].
+The class implementing it using AI is [org.jabref.logic.importer.plaincitation.LlmPlainCitationParser].

 # Step 2
+Welcome\ to\ the\ search\ walkthrough=Bienvenido al tutorial de búsqueda
+This\ walkthrough\ will\ guide\ you\ through\ JabRef's\ search\ capabilities.\ We've\ loaded\ a\ sample\ library\ to\ demonstrate\ various\ search\ techniques.=Este tutorial le guiará a través de las funciones de búsqueda de JabRef.  # Step 3
+Click\ in\ the\ search\ field\ to\ begin=Haga clic en el campo de búsqueda para comenzar.
+You\ can\ also\ use\ `Ctrl+F`\ or\ `Cmd+F`\ to\ focus\ the\ search\ field.=También puede utilizar `Ctrl+F` o `Cmd+F` para enfocar el campo de búsqueda.
 
 # Step 4
 Type\ `machine\ learning`=Tipo `aprendizaje automático`
 As\ you\ type,\ JabRef\ instantly\ dims\ all\ non-matching\ entries.\ By\ default,\ searches\ are\ case-insensitive\ and\ look\ through\ all\ fields\ like\ title,\ author,\ abstract,\ and\ keywords.=A medida que escribe, JabRef atenúa al instante todas las entradas que no coinciden. De forma predeterminada, las búsquedas no distinguen entre mayúsculas y minúsculas y revisan todos los campos, como título, autor, resumen y palabras clave.
 
 # Step 5
+Understanding\ search\ results=Comprender los resultados de búsqueda
+Notice\ how\ entries\ not\ containing\ "machine\ learning"\ are\ dimmed.=Observe cómo las entradas que no contienen "aprendizaje automático" aparecen atenuadas.
 This\ found\ entries\ with\ at\ least\ a\ field\ in\ their\ metadata\ (*e.g.,*\ title,\ author,\ abstract,\ *etc.*)\ containing\ "machine\ learning".=Se encontraron entradas con al menos un campo en sus metadatos (*por ejemplo,* título, autor, resumen, *etc.*) que contiene "aprendizaje automático".
 
 # Step 6
+Toggle\ filter\ mode\ to\ hide\ non-matching\ entries=Activar el modo de filtro para ocultar las entradas que no coinciden
+Filter\ mode\ shows\ only\ matching\ entries,\ hiding\ everything\ else.=El modo de filtro muestra sólo las entradas coincidentes y oculta todo lo demás.
 
 # Step 7
+Clear\ the\ search\ to\ see\ all\ entries\ again=Borrar la búsqueda para ver todas las entradas nuevamente
 
 # Step 8
 Type\ `author\ \=\ Son`=Tipo `autor \= Hijo`
+The\ equals\ sign\ (`\=`)\ means\ "contains"\ and\ is\ case-insensitive\ by\ default.=El signo igual (`\=`) significa "contiene" y no distingue entre mayúsculas y minúsculas de forma predeterminada.
+This\ query\ finds\ all\ papers\ where\ any\ author's\ name\ contains\ "Son,"\ including\ "Maddison,"\ "Watson,\ J.,"\ or\ "Matson,\ Robert\ P.".\ It\ won't\ match\ "Son"\ appearing\ in\ titles\ or\ abstracts.=Esta consulta encuentra todos los artículos cuyo nombre de autor contenga "Son", incluyendo "Maddison", "Watson, J." o "Matson, Robert P." No se encontrará con "Son" en títulos o resúmenes.
 
 # Step 9
+Type\ `date\ \=\=\ 2023`=Tipo `date \=\= 2023`
+The\ double\ equals\ (`\=\=`)\ means\ exact\ match,\ not\ just\ contains.\ This\ query\ finds\ only\ papers\ with\ field\ "date"\ exactly\ in\ 2023.=El doble signo igual (`\=\=`) significa coincidencia exacta, no solo contiene. Esta consulta solo encuentra artículos con el campo "fecha" correspondiente exactamente a 2023.
+With\ single\ equals\ (*e.g.,*\ `date\ \=\ 23`),\ you'd\ also\ match\ dates\ like\ 1923\ or\ 2230.=Con un solo igual (p. ej., `fecha \= 23`), también coincidirías con fechas como 1923 o 2230.
 
 # Step 10
 Type\ `shortauthor\ \=\ WHO\ AND\ date\ \=\=\ 2023`=Tipo `shortauthor\=OMS Y fecha\=\=2023`
